testcase.name: test_criteria_bound_questions_no_ambiguity[What is the best programming language for embedded systems?-comparative]
test_criteria_bound_questions_no_ambiguity[Should I use Rust to build a web API?-comparative]
test_criteria_bound_questions_no_ambiguity[\xbfCu\xe1l es el mejor framework para machine learning?-subjective_opinion]
test_classify_emits_new_types[What are the long-term risks of AI-generated code in enterprise systems?-predictive_future-predictive_future]
test_classify_emits_new_types[Could AI systems replace mid-level software engineers within the next 10 years?-predictive_future-predictive_future]
test_classify_emits_new_types[Should a high-scale AI platform use event-driven architecture or synchronous microservices?-comparative-comparative]
test_derive_temporal_sensitivity[What is the current price of bitcoin?-factual-realtime]
test_derive_temporal_sensitivity[What is the capital of Japan?-factual-static]
